description: Style Note This sleek black leather belt from provogue is sure to smarten your look with it's brilliant and trim finish. The brand brings to you class, wear these with a pair of grey trousers and look your best. Product Details Black leather belt for men Has metal buckle with a fixed loop Brand logo on buckle Material and Care Leather Use polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Style NoteThis sleek black leather belt from Provogue is sure to smarten your look with it's brilliant and trim finish.
